Thanks for contributing to Stepwise! Please read CONTRIBUTING.md first.
Keep PRs scoped to one logical change.

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Other

## How was this verified?

<!-- Paste the relevant command output. -->

- [ ] `python -m ruff check stepwise tests scripts`
- [ ] `python -m pytest tests/ -q`
- [ ] `cd web && npm run lint`
- [ ] `cd web && npm run build`

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are scoped to a single logical change.
- [ ] Code matches the surrounding style; no unrelated reformatting.
- [ ] Docs updated (README / CHANGELOG / etc.) where behavior or setup changed.
- [ ] Added a `[Unreleased]` entry to `CHANGELOG.md` if user-facing.
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` files committed.
